title: Posting index summary line, version 1
description: One compact line per posting in index/postings.jsonl — the ~15 fields code-side filters use. seq is the materialization sequence cursors ride.

canonical_url.description: canonicalized primary source URL — the search pipeline's store_key join key

carried.description: true when this row lacks derived backing this build — either a not-synced-here derived carry-forward, or a durable-floor index-only survivor (see carried_from)

carried_from.description: provenance of a carried row: 'index' means the row survives only in the pre-existing index/postings.jsonl (no current entity, no derived on disk, no tombstone) and was preserved verbatim at its original seq
